scripts.build: tsc && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --minify --define:DBG=false --define:DBG2=false --legal-comments=inline --outfile=dist/384.esm.js && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --minify --define:DBG=false --define:DBG2=false --global-name=__  --legal-comments=inline --outfile=dist/384.iife.js && dts-bundle-generator -o dist/384.esm.d.ts src/index.ts
scripts.build:debug: tsc && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --sourcemap --define:DBG=true --define:DBG2=false --outfile=dist/384.esm.js && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --sourcemap=inline --sources-content=true --define:DBG=true --define:DBG2=false --outfile=dist/384.esm.debug.js && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --sourcemap=linked --define:DBG=true --define:DBG2=false --global-name=__ --outfile=dist/384.iife.js && dts-bundle-generator -o dist/384.esm.d.ts src/index.ts && cp dist/384.esm.d.ts dist/384.esm.debug.d.ts
scripts.test:coverage: deno test --coverage=./tests.unit/coverage --no-check --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-env --allow-run --unstable tests.unit/ && deno coverage --exclude='deno' --exclude='env.js' --exclude='config.js' --exclude='384.esm.js' --unstable --lcov ./tests.unit/coverage/ > ./tests.unit/coverage/lcov.info && genhtml ./tests.unit/coverage/lcov.info --output-directory ./tests.unit/coverage/html && open ./tests.unit/coverage/html/index.html
scripts.all: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run sw && npm run build:api && (cd demos && npm run all)
